pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly state this required pattern, which is checked by verifier.py.
Task instructions explicitly state these required retention settings.
Task instructions explicitly provide these arguments for whisper-resize.py.
feed_real_data.py maps real NAB data (traffic_speed_1.csv) to servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1, generating this file.
feed_real_data.py maps real NAB data (traffic_speed_2.csv) to servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2, generating this file.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real web traffic speed metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) realTraffic dataset. The target pattern '^servers\.web_traffic\..*', retention schemas ('1m:7d, 10m:30d' in config and '1m:7d 10m:30d' as CLI arguments), and target database files (speed_sensor_1.wsp and speed_sensor_2.wsp) explicitly match both the task description instructions and the verifier.py logic. The agent is explicitly required to modify the configuration before the [default] block and use whisper-resize.py to preserve historical time-series data without wiping it.
